subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Upon thee be the peace of God and His loving-kindness! Some days past, permission to return was granted unto the travelers and emigrants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد علیک سلام الله و عنایته چند یوم قبل مسافرین و مهاجرین را اذن رجوع
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @business; financial; property matters
